name: go2-foxglove
description: Stream a Unitree Go2's LiDAR, pose/TF, body state and front camera into Foxglove, and drive/map/record it over ROS 2 (bridge, camera, ros2, recorder, sit_stand, slam, nav2).

questions.title: App ID
questions.description: Unique app identifier on the device. Letters, digits, '.', '_' and '-' only.

questions.title: Go2 controller IP
questions.prompt: Go2 controller IP (for the camera's WebRTC connection)
questions.description: The robot controller's address on the internal robot LAN. Used by the camera service for WebRTC and by the ROS 2 services to pick the NIC that routes to the robot.

questions.title: This device's IP on the robot LAN
questions.prompt: This device's IP on the robot LAN (DDS bind address)
questions.description: The IP THIS machine holds on the robot LAN. DDS binds by address (not interface name) because the Go2 Orin is multi-homed. On the Go2's onboard Jetson this is usually 192.168.123.18.

questions.title: Foxglove WebSocket port
questions.prompt: Foxglove WebSocket port served by the bridge
questions.description: Port the bridge serves the Foxglove WebSocket on. Connect Foxglove to ws://<device>:<port>.
